area.value: one living creature one living creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

description.value: Pain strike racks the targeted creature with agony, inflicting 1d6 points of nonlethal damage per round for 1 round per level (maximum 10 rounds). Additionally, the affected creature is sickened for the spell’s duration, and the caster gains a +4 circumstance bonus on Intimidate checks against the target. Pain Strike, Mass This spell works like pain strike, except as noted above. Section 15: Copyright Notice Advanced Player’s Guide. Copyright 2010, Paizo Publishing, LLC; Author: Jason Bulmahn.
